author: ymrohit
name: 11L XSA4 Late Shared Workspace Adapter (LSWA-64x4) + MLP2.5
blurb: Late Shared Workspace Adapter (LSWA) adds a shared token-to-workspace-to-token writeback path only in late decoder blocks on top of the public March 23 11-layer record lineage, while keeping the trunk close to the donor. This snapshot keeps the novel part focused: same 11x512 banked backbone, same XSA-last-4 recipe, same bigram and VE paths, but with LSWA-64x4, MLP_MULT=2.5, and a simplified no-TTT/no-EMA exact-eval deployment. Best included legal seed is 1.08568610 exact post-quant val_bpb at 15,900,041 bytes.
